One row per Nextflow task. ParCa rows are model-fitting per RNA-seq input; sim rows are cell-cycle simulations on a surviving variant. Green = exit 0, red = failed. Duration is wall-clock seconds.

Cell mass over time

Mass components over time (median across seeds)

Growth rate distribution

Amino-acid synthesis enzyme abundance — log2 fold change vs baseline

Per amino acid (rows): the model-summed protein count of all forward-synthesis enzymes for that AA, averaged across all (seed × time) for the variant, then log2-folded against variant 0 (the unperturbed baseline). Cells must synthesize all 20 AAs in M9 minus AAs, so any cross-variant signal here is the perturbation biting. ★-marked rows are AAs whose synthesis enzymes have explicit RNA-expression overrides in rna_expression_adjustments.tsv.
